name: OCR Fax Outbound (poll intake)
description: SQS INTAKE from fax-consumer: communicationId -> s3Key -> Captricity create/upload/submit -> persist ocr_outbound_batch.

pipeline.script: response = (function(){ var uuidGen = function(){ return 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, function(c){ var r = Math.random() * 16 | 0, v = (c === 'x') ? r : (r & 0x3 | 0x8); return v.toString(16); }); }; var name = request.batchName || request.name || uuidGen(); return { batchName: name, name: name, workflowId: String(request.workflowId || request.workflow_id || '538'), fileName: (request.fileName || request.file_name || ((request.communicationId || request.communication_id || mainReq.body.communicationId) + '.pdf')), communicationId: (request.communicationId || request.communication_id || mainReq.body.communicationId), programId: (request.programId || mainReq.body.programId), sourceType: (request.sourceType || mainReq.body.sourceType || 'FAX'), tenantId: (request.tenantId || mainReq.body.tenantId), s3Key: (request.s3Key || request.s3_key || mainReq.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3_key), hasFilePayload: !!(request.s3Key || request.s3_key || request.hasFilePayload || mainReq.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3_key) }; })();

body.script: response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, name: req.body.batchName, workflowId: req.body.workflowId };

response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, name: req.body.name, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fileName: req.body.fileName, communicationId: req.body.communicationId, programId: req.body.programId, s3Key: req.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3_key, hasFilePayload: req.body.hasFilePayload, batchId: String((res && (res.batchId || res.id || (res.raw && res.raw.id))) || ''), createResponse: res };

var cid = req.body.communicationId || mainReq.body.communicationId; var bid = req.body.batchId; response = { batchId: bid, fileName: req.body.fileName || mainReq.body.fileName || 'document.pdf', s3Key: req.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3_key, fileField: 'uploaded_file', contentType: mainReq.body.contentType || 'application/pdf', communicationId: cid, metadata: { batch_file_metadata: [{ metadata: { communication_ref: String(cid || bid || ''), tenant_id: String(req.body.tenantId || mainReq.body.tenantId || ''), batch_name: String(req.body.batchName || '') } }] } };

response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fileName: req.body.fileName, communicationId: req.body.communicationId, programId: req.body.programId, batchId: req.body.batchId, s3Key: req.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3_key, createResponse: req.body.createResponse, uploaded: true, uploadResponse: res };

response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fileName: req.body.fileName, communicationId: req.body.communicationId, programId: req.body.programId, batchId: req.body.batchId, s3Key: req.body.s3Key, createResponse: req.body.createResponse, uploadResponse: req.body.uploadResponse, uploaded: req.body.uploaded, submitted: true, submitResponse: res };

args.script: JSON.stringify({ batchId: req.body.batchId, batchName: req.body.batchName, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fileName: req.body.fileName, communicationId: req.body.communicationId, programId: req.body.programId, s3Key: req.body.s3Key, uploaded: req.body.uploaded, submitted: req.body.submitted, createResponse: req.body.createResponse, uploadResponse: req.body.uploadResponse, submitResponse: req.body.submitResponse })

pipeline.script: response = { success: true, batchId: request.batchId, workflowId: request.workflowId, fileName: request.fileName, communicationId: request.communicationId, programId: request.programId, submitted: !!request.submitted, persisted: true };
response = Object.assign({}, request, { failureReason: (request.failureReason || 'OCR fax outbound Captricity call failed after retries') });
response = { success: false, communicationId: request.communicationId, batchId: request.batchId, reason: request.failureReason || 'OCR fax outbound failed' };
